name: codesensei
description: Learn any codebase with AI, then test your understanding through a live, voice-driven Knowledge Check session.

codeSensei.stt.model.description: STT model slug. Voxtral Mini Transcribe via OpenRouter by default.

codeSensei.stt.apiKey.description: API key for STT endpoint. Falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY then OPENAI_API_KEY.

codeSensei.tts.baseUrl.description: Base URL for text-to-speech (OpenAI-compatible /audio/speech). Kokoro FastAPI by default.

codeSensei.tts.apiKey.description: API key for TTS endpoint. Kokoro doesn't require one.

codeSensei.tts.voice.description: Voice name. Kokoro voices: af_heart, af_bella, af_nova, etc.

codeSensei.tts.responseFormat.description: Audio format returned by the TTS endpoint. Kokoro supports wav/flac/ogg; OpenAI TTS supports mp3/opus/aac/flac.

codeSensei.chat.baseUrl.description: Base URL for chat completions (chained mode).

codeSensei.chat.model.description: Chat model for Knowledge Check orchestration in chained mode.

codeSensei.chat.apiKey.description: API key for chat endpoint. Falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY then OPENAI_API_KEY.

codeSensei.audio.inputDeviceId.description: PortAudio input device ID for mic capture. -1 = default device. Use the dropdown in the settings panel to pick.

codeSensei.audio.silenceSeconds.description: Seconds of silence before ending a speech segment. Higher = more patient (good for thoughtful answers), lower = snappier.

codeSensei.audio.beepEnabled.description: Play a beep sound when it's your turn to speak.

codeSensei.acp.selectedAgentId.description: Id of the ACP agent used to gather codebase context. Built-in ids: codex, devin.

codeSensei.acp.agentConfigs.description: Per-agent configuration map (agentId -> { model, reasoningEffort, agentMode, sandboxMode, modelProvider, extraEnv, extraSessionConfig }). Set via the Configure ACP Agent command.

codeSensei.acp.contextPrompt.default: You are analyzing this codebase so its user can learn it and test their understanding. Produce a concise structured summary covering: (1) the project's purpose and tech stack, (2) the most important files and why they matter, (3) the trickiest or most interesting code areas worth understanding, and (4) 5-10 knowledge-check topics each tied to a specific file path and a short rationale. Return the result as JSON with keys: summary, files (array of {path, role}), topics (array of {title, filePath, lineStart, lineEnd, rationale}).
codeSensei.acp.contextPrompt.description: Prompt sent to the ACP agent to extract codebase learning and knowledge-check context.

codeSensei.acp.customAgents.description: Additional ACP-over-stdio agents. Validated with an ACP initialize handshake when used.

codeSensei.interview.maxQuestions.description: Maximum number of questions to ask. 0 = unlimited until the user stops.

codeSensei.tutor.explanationMode.description: Default Code Tutor guide depth: Quick Overview, Guided Walkthrough, or Deep Dive.
